item.title: January 4, 2026 - Badwater Basin & Artist's Palette
item.description: Wrapped up the trip with a drive down Badwater Road to see Badwater Basin, Lake Manly, and Artist's Palette.

item.title: January 3, 2026 - Death Valley Hiking
item.description: Big hiking day in Death Valley National Park. Explored Mosaic Canyon, Golden Canyon, and Mesquite Flat Sand Dunes.

item.title: January 2, 2026 - Stuck in the Mud
item.description: Oh boy. Buckle up for this one. Got stuck in a mud pit and had to be rescued by American Towing. Made it to Stovepipe Wells eventually.

item.title: January 1, 2026 - Trona Pinnacles
item.description: Happy New Year! Drove out to Trona Pinnacles. Stopped on a random dirt road off Pinnacle Road after dark.

item.title: December 13, 2025 - Hole-in-the-Wall Campground
item.description: Second outing to Essex, CA. Camped near Hole in the Wall Campground and did the Hole in the Wall Rings loop in the morning.

item.title: December 11, 2025 - First Night in Camper
item.description: The first night in the camper shell! Camped at White Cross World War I Memorial in Nipton, CA. Great trails and plenty of free camping spots.

item.title: December 7, 2025 - Truck Setup
item.description: Set up the camper shell and built out a bed system in the truck bed. Ready to start the California National Parks adventure!
